name: copse
description: Drive and assert a running Cocos canvas game through its live node tree — no pixels, no input simulation. AI-friendly integration/flow testing. Runtime sibling to coir.

scripts.build: npm run build:full && npm run build:lite && npm run build:probe && npm run build:pixi
scripts.build:full: esbuild src/cocos/inject.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/copse.inject.js --banner:js='/* copse inject bundle (full) — exposes globalThis.copse + auto-installs window.__copse once cc is live. Rebuild: npm run build */'
scripts.build:lite: esbuild src/cocos/inject-lite.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/copse.inject.lite.js --banner:js='/* copse inject bundle (lite) — snapshot/press/get/call/node/diff only, NO reachability. Auto-installs window.__copse once cc is live. Rebuild: npm run build */'
scripts.build:probe: esbuild src/cocos/inject-probe.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/copse.inject.probe.js --banner:js='/* copse inject bundle (probe) — load-metrics + drive surface (probe/firstClickable/find/interactive/reachable/press) for a --until driver; keeps reachability, drops snapshot-extras/get/call/diff/logs. Auto-installs window.__copse once cc is live. Rebuild: npm run build */'
scripts.build:pixi: esbuild src/pixi/inject.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/copse.inject.pixi.js --banner:js='/* copse inject bundle (pixi) — PixiJS 8. Arms globalThis.__PIXI_APP_INIT__ FIRST (pre-boot capture, zero game cooperation), then auto-installs window.__copse. See docs/ENGINES.md. Rebuild: npm run build */'
